outreach.diagnosis: The Vietnamese Restaurant appears to have no meaningful website presence, which means search and referral traffic has nowhere strong to land. A simple, credible restaurant site would likely improve trust and enquiry conversion.
outreach.specificObservation: Google Maps showed Facebook only / no independent website visible during Discord discovery.
outreach.coldMessageAngle: Noticed there is no dedicated website experience for your restaurant in Fortitude Valley, so I mocked up what a clearer first impression could look like.
